research_basis: Positive psychology (Seligman, Lyubomirsky), goal-setting theory (Locke & Latham), imagination development (Vygotsky), future orientation, hope theory (Snyder), aspiration research

teenagers.clue: This psychologist proposed that positive psychology focuses on flourishing and well-being rather than just treating illness
